description: AWS::CloudWatch::OTelEnrichment enables OTel metric enrichment in CloudWatch, allowing CloudWatch vended metrics to be available for PromQL querying enriched with AWS resource tags and metadata.

Status.description: Current status of OTel enrichment (RUNNING or STOPPED).
Status.markdownDescription:
Current status of OTel enrichment (RUNNING or STOPPED).

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: RUNNING | STOPPED  
Update requires: No interruption

AccountId.description: The AWS account ID. This is the primary identifier for this singleton resource.
AccountId.markdownDescription:
The AWS account ID. This is the primary identifier for this singleton resource.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes
